items.title: Require proof of citizenship and paper-ballot election safeguards

existing_matches.title: Require proof of citizenship and paper-ballot election safeguards

suggestions.title_normalized: Require proof of citizenship and paper-ballot election safeguards
suggestions.summary_suggestion: A March 2025 executive order advanced part of the administration's election-integrity agenda, but full implementation remained incomplete.
suggestions.impacted_group_suggestion: Black voters and Black-majority communities affected by voter registration, ballot access, and election administration rules
suggestions.ambiguity_notes: Dry-run heuristic review only. Operator should confirm wording, match choice, and downstream effect notes.

items.title: End federal DEI and equity-based government programs

existing_matches.title: End federal DEI and equity-based government programs

suggestions.title_normalized: End federal DEI and equity-based government programs
suggestions.summary_suggestion: The administration ordered the termination of federal DEI and equity structures, but implementation remained an active multi-agency process.
suggestions.impacted_group_suggestion: Black workers, Black students, and Black communities affected by targeted federal equity initiatives and program design
suggestions.ambiguity_notes: Dry-run heuristic review only. Operator should confirm wording, match choice, and downstream effect notes.

items.title: Increase federal support for state and local law enforcement

existing_matches.title: Increase federal support for state and local law enforcement

suggestions.title_normalized: Increase federal support for state and local law enforcement
suggestions.summary_suggestion: A 2025 executive order expanded federal support and protections for local law enforcement, but downstream local effects remained early.
suggestions.impacted_group_suggestion: Black communities affected by policing, public safety policy, arrest exposure, and federal oversight of local law enforcement
suggestions.ambiguity_notes: Dry-run heuristic review only. Operator should confirm wording, match choice, and downstream effect notes.

items.title: Clear street encampments and expand treatment-oriented street-order responses

existing_matches.title: Clear street encampments and expand treatment-oriented street-order responses

suggestions.title_normalized: Clear street encampments and expand treatment-oriented street-order responses
suggestions.summary_suggestion: A 2025 order advanced the administration's street-order agenda, but the balance between enforcement and treatment outcomes remained unresolved.
suggestions.impacted_group_suggestion: Black unhoused people and Black neighborhoods affected by homelessness policy, encampment enforcement, and access to treatment services
suggestions.ambiguity_notes: Dry-run heuristic review only. Operator should confirm wording, match choice, and downstream effect notes.

items.title: Expand domestic production of critical medicines

existing_matches.title: Expand domestic production of critical medicines

suggestions.title_normalized: Expand domestic production of critical medicines
suggestions.summary_suggestion: A 2025 executive order advanced domestic-medicine production goals, but measurable supply and access outcomes remained early.
suggestions.impacted_group_suggestion: Black patients and Black communities affected by medicine shortages, chronic-disease treatment continuity, and pharmaceutical supply disruptions
suggestions.ambiguity_notes: Dry-run heuristic review only. Operator should confirm wording, match choice, and downstream effect notes.

items.title: Expand educational freedom and school-choice options for families

existing_matches.title: Expand educational freedom and school-choice options for families

suggestions.title_normalized: Expand educational freedom and school-choice options for families
suggestions.summary_suggestion: The administration launched a federal school-choice initiative in early 2025, but the effects remained dependent on later state and grant implementation.
suggestions.impacted_group_suggestion: Black students and Black families affected by school access, public-school quality, transportation, and alternative education options
suggestions.ambiguity_notes: Dry-run heuristic review only. Operator should confirm wording, match choice, and downstream effect notes.

items.title: Reform higher-education accreditation around student outcomes

existing_matches.title: Reform higher-education accreditation around student outcomes

suggestions.title_normalized: Reform higher-education accreditation around student outcomes
suggestions.summary_suggestion: The administration launched accreditation reform in 2025, but institutional and student-level effects remained in an early implementation stage.
suggestions.impacted_group_suggestion: Black college students and institutions serving large Black student populations, including HBCUs and other minority-serving institutions
suggestions.ambiguity_notes: Dry-run heuristic review only. Operator should confirm wording, match choice, and downstream effect notes.

items.title: Promote excellence and innovation at HBCUs

existing_matches.title: Promote excellence and innovation at HBCUs

suggestions.title_normalized: Promote excellence and innovation at HBCUs
suggestions.summary_suggestion: The administration reestablished a White House HBCU initiative in 2025, with broader institutional effects still dependent on implementation.
suggestions.impacted_group_suggestion: Black students, faculty, and institutions at Historically Black Colleges and Universities
suggestions.ambiguity_notes: Dry-run heuristic review only. Operator should confirm wording, match choice, and downstream effect notes.

items.title: Reinstate school discipline policies without equity-based disparate-impact framing

existing_matches.title: Reinstate school discipline policies without equity-based disparate-impact framing

suggestions.title_normalized: Reinstate school discipline policies without equity-based disparate-impact framing
suggestions.summary_suggestion: The administration ordered a review and replacement process for federal school-discipline guidance, but school-level effects remained unmeasured.
suggestions.impacted_group_suggestion: Black students and Black families affected by suspension, expulsion, referral-to-law-enforcement, and school discipline policies
suggestions.ambiguity_notes: Dry-run heuristic review only. Operator should confirm wording, match choice, and downstream effect notes.

items.title: Prepare Americans for high-paying skilled trade jobs

existing_matches.title: Prepare Americans for high-paying skilled trade jobs

suggestions.title_normalized: Prepare Americans for high-paying skilled trade jobs
suggestions.summary_suggestion: The administration launched a skilled-trades workforce initiative in 2025, but measurable labor-market effects remained early.
suggestions.impacted_group_suggestion: Black workers and Black jobseekers affected by access to apprenticeships, workforce programs, and higher-wage skilled trades
suggestions.ambiguity_notes: Dry-run heuristic review only. Operator should confirm wording, match choice, and downstream effect notes.
